response.justification: Bogdan brings 10+ years of full-stack experience well above the 6+ year requirement, with strong TypeScript/Node.js/React work at Optilyz and current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq that directly matches the stack. He has the required databases (MongoDB, MySQL), cloud (AWS CDK), Docker, Git, and Java experience, plus a CS degree and a track record of testing-focused craftsmanship (TDD, workshops, his own assertion/test runner libraries). Gaps are Nest.js and explicit Vitest experience, but his testing depth and framework breadth should bridge those quickly.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS at Optilyz
Direct AI-agent and MCP code-generator experience at current role (re:cinq)
Strong testing/craftsmanship background — TDD advocate, built own test runner (Trial) and assertion library (Fluent-Asserts), ran Selenium and refactoring courses
concerns: No Nest.js experience listed; framework familiarity will need to be confirmed
No explicit Vitest mention (Jest/Vitest-specific depth unclear despite broad testing background)
Significant career investment in DLang reduces relative time on the primary TS/Node ecosystem

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at re:cinq
Missing Nest.js and explicit Vitest experience
